title: tephrosia alpestris
intro: Tephrosia alpestris, also known as the Mountain Hoofprint, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia alpestris include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal benefits, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
